name: player_weight crafted year_offset range returns each player's own weight, not the cross-player SUM (executed-result parity)
description: Seed two players (weights 200 and 300). Before the year-less-source guard, a crafted year_offset:[1,2] on the base-player column emitted (SELECT SUM(player.weight) FROM player WHERE player.pid = player.pid) -- a self-join tautology summing weight over EVERY player (so both rows showed the same giant total). The guard renders the plain per-row value, so each player shows its own weight.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."weight_pounds" AS "weight_pounds_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."weight_pounds", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, weight_pounds) VALUES ('TEST-WGTA-000923', 'Test', 'Wgta', 'T.Wgta', 'Test Wgta', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 200)

INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, weight_pounds) VALUES ('TEST-WGTB-000924', 'Test', 'Wgtb', 'T.Wgtb', 'Test Wgtb', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 300)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT weight_pounds AS weight_pounds_0 FROM player WHERE primary_position = 'ZZ'
